hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase
hierarchy.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-yellow-500

layout.geometry: sharp edges, rounded-none for all components

button.primary: bg-yellow-500 text-black font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-yellow-400 transition-all uppercase tracking-wider text-sm inline-flex items-center justify-center
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all uppercase tracking-wider text-sm inline-flex items-center justify-center

components.card: bg-[#0A0F1C] border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-none hover:border-yellow-500/50 transition-colors group
components.input: bg-[#050810] border border-white/10 text-white px-4 py-3 rounded-none focus:outline-none focus:border-yellow-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-500 w-full placeholder:text-slate-600
components.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-400 font-semibold mb-2 block
components.navigation: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#050810]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

hero_background.alt: Modern office building exterior at night
hero_background.usage: Hero section background with a heavy dark gradient overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#050810]/90 via-[#050810]/70 to-transparent

instructions_to_main_agent: ICONS: Use @phosphor-icons/react with `weight='duotone'` for a premium tech feel across all service icons and UI elements.

AESTHETIC: Strictly follow Archetype 4 (Swiss Brutalist High-Contrast) adapted for Security. Use sharp corners (`rounded-none`), heavy typography, and stark 1px borders (`border-white/10`). Avoid soft rounded corners and excessive shadows. Keep it rigid, authoritative, and secure.

ROUTING: Since it's a Marketing site with multiple pages (Home, About, Services, Pricing, Careers, Contact), ensure a proper client-side routing setup (e.g. react-router-dom) or a long-scrolling landing page structure if preferred. The prompt requests 'Pages Required', so implement separate routes or well-defined hash-linked sections.

LAYOUT: Apply the BENTO Grid Protocol for the Services section. Do NOT make all cards the same size. Make the most important service (e.g., Manned Guarding) a large span (`md:col-span-8 row-span-2`) and others smaller (`col-span-4`). Use images from the media object as background covers on these bento cards with an overlay.

HERO SECTION: Must use the `hero_background` image with a very heavy dark overlay so the white and gold text pops. Ensure the overlay is something like `bg-[#050810]/80` so the image acts as texture rather than a distracting photograph.

FORMS: The Contact, Get a Quote, and Careers pages need robust, highly styled forms. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn primitives internally if needed, heavily modified to be square/sharp. Add a CV Upload dropzone area for Careers.
MARQUEE: Add a slow, low-contrast marquee of 'Industries We Serve' or 'Trust Badges' using `react-fast-marquee`. Make the text uppercase and widely tracked.

ACCESSIBILITY & TESTING: Every interactive element (buttons, form inputs, links, accordion headers) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g. `data-testid='hero-cta-button'`).
ANIMATION: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered fade-ups and micro-interactions. Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling on the main wrapper.
